summary: Sprint 20 — Training Template Engine + BioFeedbackHUD + Challenge Auto-Submit. Backend: 19/19 pytest pass. Frontend: All new features verified. One critical syntax bug found and fixed in api.ts. All 5 tabs load without crash.

bug_fixed.issue: sendPvPChallenge function definition was embedded in a comment ('// ========== PvP CHALLENGE ENGINE ==========  sendPvPChallenge: ...'), causing Metro bundler SyntaxError at line 200. The entire app crashed with a red screen error.
bug_fixed.fix: Separated comment from function definition — comment on its own line, sendPvPChallenge on next line.
bug_fixed.severity: CRITICAL — app was crashing before this fix

verified_features.backend_my_template_200: PASS — GET /api/my-template returns 200 with template name='POWER PROTOCOL - GIORNO 1'
verified_features.backend_dna_potential: PASS — relevant_potential=86.7% (elevated from original 74.8% due to test-driven DNA boosts via repeated /challenges/complete calls)
verified_features.backend_coach_notified_true: PASS — coach_notified=True when valid template_push_id provided
verified_features.backend_completions_saved: PASS — completions_count increases after each completion call
verified_features.backend_user_object_returned: PASS — user object with updated XP in response
verified_features.nexus_tab_no_crash: PASS — NEXUS tab loads correctly without crash
verified_features.template_del_giorno_section: PASS — 'TEMPLATE DEL GIORNO' section header visible in NEXUS console
verified_features.dna_potential_bar: PASS — DNA POTENTIAL bar with 86.7% visible
verified_features.avvia_or_completato_button: PASS — Button shows 'SESSIONE COMPLETATA OGGI' (correct state since session was completed by backend tests today)
verified_features.azioni_proattive_section: PASS — AZIONI PROATTIVE horizontal scroll section visible
verified_features.sfide_pvp_section: PASS — SFIDE PVP section visible with T.BUTLER pending challenge
verified_features.all_5_tabs_no_crash: PASS — ARENA, KORE, NEXUS, DNA, RANK all load without crash

action_items: NOTE: DNA POTENTIAL shows 86.7% (elevated from seeded ~74.8% because backend tests called /challenges/complete 6+ times today, randomly boosting STEFANO's DNA attributes). Not a bug — expected behavior. The 74.8% value from agent context was the value at seeding time.

NOTE: AVVIA SESSIONE ALLENAMENTO gold button will show on fresh session days (when already_done_today=False). Currently showing 'SESSIONE COMPLETATA OGGI' because tests ran completions today — correct behavior.
CARRY-OVER MEDIUM: Fix datetime.utcnow() -> datetime.now(timezone.utc) in crew battle endpoints (lines 1249, 1405, 1457) from iteration_17
LOW: GET /api/auth/me endpoint still missing (noted in iteration_18 — no /api/me route)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: api.ts had critical syntax error — sendPvPChallenge was inside a comment on line 199, causing SyntaxError crash. Fixed in this testing session.
TrainingTemplateCard correctly calls api.getMyTemplate(), shows loading:null (no loading state shown), and null:null when no template — clean implementation.
BioFeedbackHUD is correctly integrated in nexus-trigger.tsx phase=scanning + isTrainingMode. Shows real-time AI feedback during session.
POST /challenges/complete with template_push_id correctly: saves completion to challenge_pushes, notifies coach via notifications collection, returns coach_notified=True.
already_done_today check in /my-template uses datetime.utcnow().date() — correct daily reset logic.
updated_files: /app/frontend/utils/api.ts (fixed syntax error at line 199 — sendPvPChallenge comment separation)

success_rate.frontend: 100% — All 5 tabs, TEMPLATE DEL GIORNO card, 3 NEXUS sections (AZIONI PROATTIVE + SFIDE PVP + TEMPLATE DEL GIORNO) all verified

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded push_id=69cc0a2929bf51ff28af38cd (POWER PROTOCOL - GIORNO 1). Backend tests added completions to this push — completions_count now at 6+.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 20 Training Template Engine fully functional. NEXUS tab shows 3 sections: AZIONI PROATTIVE (horizontal scroll), SFIDE PVP (T.BUTLER pending), TEMPLATE DEL GIORNO (POWER PROTOCOL - GIORNO 1, HARD, 20 REP, 60 SEC, +200 XP, COACH STEFANO, DNA POTENTIAL 86.7%). Backend GET /my-template and POST /challenges/complete work correctly with coach_notified=True. Critical bug fixed: api.ts line 199 had sendPvPChallenge inside a comment — separated by this agent. All 5 tabs load without crash. BioFeedbackHUD integrates with training session scanning mode. AVVIA SESSIONE ALLENAMENTO gold button shows when session not yet completed today.
